summary: Phase B Platform Alignment Testing Complete. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all Phase B features: CRM Page V2 with List/Cards/Kanban view toggle, Customers Page V2 with advanced filters and Table/Cards toggle, Creative Service Brief Page with dynamic form fields and add-on pricing.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns data without authentication (allows anonymous access)
Endpoint returns data without authentication (allows anonymous access)
Industry field sent by frontend is not saved - CustomerCreate model in customer_models.py missing 'industry' and 'source' fields

integration_issues.issue: CustomersPageV2 includes industry field in form but backend CustomerCreate model doesn't support it - field not persisted

TestCustomersAPI.test_list_customers: PASS - Returns customers with city, payment_term_type, credit_limit

TestCustomersAPI.test_customer_has_required_filter_fields: PASS - Has city, payment_term_type, credit_limit (industry not in model)

TestCreativeServicesV2API.test_get_logo_design_service: PASS - Has brief_fields array with 6 fields
TestCreativeServicesV2API.test_get_flyer_design_service: PASS - Has different brief_fields including campaign_name

TestCreativeServicesV2API.test_brief_field_types: PASS - Supports text, textarea, select field types

TestCreativeServiceOrdersAPI.test_create_service_order: PASS - Order created with brief_answers and selected_addons
TestCreativeServiceOrdersAPI.test_order_includes_addon_total: PASS - Total price includes addon prices

crm_page_v2.list_view_columns: PASS - Company, Contact, Industry, Source, Value, Status, Actions

crm_page_v2.add_lead_form: PASS - Form opens with Industry and Source dropdowns from CRM settings

customers_page_v2.table_columns: PASS - Company, Contact, Industry, City, Payment Terms, Credit Limit, Actions
customers_page_v2.stats_row: PASS - Shows Total(19), Active(3), Credit Accounts(5), With TIN(2), Total Credit Limit(TZS 30M)

logo_design_page.service_title: PASS - 'Logo Design' with TZS 150,000 base price
logo_design_page.dynamic_fields: PASS - 6 fields rendered from brief_fields (Business Name, Tagline, Industry, Target Audience, Preferred Colors, Style Direction)
logo_design_page.field_types: PASS - Text inputs(5), Textareas(2), Select dropdowns(2)

action_items: Add 'industry' and 'source' fields to CustomerCreate/CustomerUpdate models in /app/backend/customer_models.py
Update customer API endpoints to accept and store industry/source fields
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerCreate model missing industry and source fields that frontend CustomersPageV2 expects
Admin endpoints allow unauthenticated access - verify if intentional for the app design
seed_data_creation: Test lead and customer created and cleaned up during backend testing. Creative service order created via POST /api/creative-services-v2/orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B Platform Alignment fully tested. Key routes tested: 1) GET /api/admin/crm-settings - industries and sources for CRM dropdowns, 2) GET/POST /api/admin/crm/leads - leads with industry/source/value, 3) GET/POST /api/admin/customers - customers with city/payment_terms/credit_limit (industry field not in model), 4) GET /api/creative-services-v2/{slug} - services with brief_fields array, 5) POST /api/creative-services-v2/orders - order creation with brief_answers and addons. Frontend pages: /admin/crm (List/Cards/Kanban), /admin/customers (Table/Cards with 4 filters), /creative-services/{slug} (dynamic brief form).
